info.title: dotnet-resteaseclientgenerator
info.description: Generate a RestEase compatible client (Interface and Models) based on a Swagger / OpenApi or RAML specification.

options.name: --File
options.description:
Required. The Swagger or
OpenApi file. Can be
'.json' or '.raml'.

options.name: --DestinationFolder
options.description:
Required. The destination
folder to place the
generated C# files.

options.name: --SingleFile
options.description:
(Default: true) Generate
Single .cs file.

options.name: --ArrayType
options.description:
(Default: Array) The Array
type to use.

options.name: --Namespace
options.description:
Required. The Namespace to
use for the generated
class file(s).

options.name: --UseDateTimeOffset
options.description:
(Default: false) Use
DateTimeOffset instead of
DateTime.

options.name: --ApiNamespace
options.description:
(Default: Api) Append this
namespace for the Api.

options.name: --ModelsNamespace
options.description:
(Default: Models) Append
this namespace for the
Models.

options.name: --GenerationType
options.description:
(Default: Both) Define
what should be generated.

options.name: --PreferredEnumType
options.description:
(Default: String)
Preferred Enum Type to
generate. In case 'enum'
is selected, enum classes
are generated if needed.

options.name: --ApiName
options.description:
Required. The base
FileName of the generated
.cs files.

options.name: --MethodReturnType
options.description:
(Default: Type) The
ReturnType to use for the
methods. For more details
see

options.name: --AppendAsync
options.description:
(Default: true) Append
Async postfix to all
methods.

options.name: --MultipartFormDataFileType
options.description:
(Default: ByteArray) The
MultipartFormData FileType
to use.

options.name: --ApplicationOctetStreamType
options.description:
(Default: ByteArray) The
application/octet-stream

options.name: --GenerateMultipartFormDataExtensionMethods
options.description:
(Default: true) Generate
Extension methods for
MultipartFormData methods.

options.name: --GenerateApplicationOctetStreamExtensionMethods
options.description:
(Default: true) Generate
ApplicationOctetStream

options.name: --GenerateFormUrlEncodedExtensionMethods
options.description:
(Default: true) Generate
FormUrlEncoded methods.

options.name: --ReturnObjectFromMethod
options.description:
(Default: false) Return
Object from Method when
Response is defined but no
Model is specified.

options.name: --PreferredContentType
options.description:
(Default: ApplicationJson)
Preferred Content-Type to
use when both
'application/json' and
'application/xml' are
defined.

options.name: --ForceContentTypeToApplicationJson
options.description:
(Default: false) Always
use Content-Type
'application/json', also
when multiple
Content-Types are are

options.name: --UseOperationIdAsMethodName
options.description:
(Default: true) Use the
OperationId as method
name, if valid.

options.name: --PreferredSecurityDefinitionType
options.description:
(Default: Automatic)
Preferred
SecurityDefinition type to
add to the interface.

options.name: --MakeNonRequiredParametersOptional
options.description:
(Default: true) Append '=
null' to optional
parameters in the
interface methods.

options.name: --DefineAllMethodHeadersOnInterface
options.description:
(Default: false) Define
all method-headers on the
interface.

options.name: --DefineSharedMethodQueryParametersOnInterface
options.description:
(Default: true) Define all
shared method query
parameters on the

options.name: --GenerateAndUseModelForAnyOfOrOneOf
options.description:
(Default: true) Generate
and use model for 'AnyOf'
and 'OneOf' return types.

options.name: --PreferredMultipleResponsesType
options.description:
(Default: AnyOf) Preferred
MultipleResponsesType to
use when multiple
responses are defined for
a path.

options.name: --GeneratePrimitivePropertiesAsNullable
options.description:
(Default: false) Generate
properties as nullable for
OpenApi 2.0

options.name: --SupportExtensionXNullable
options.description:
(Default: false) Support
vendor extension
'x-nullable' to indicate a
property as nullable for

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version
information.
https://github.com/canton7
